title: Quotation form update, admin login redirect, UX improvements, bilingual toggle, and app branding

requirements.text: On the 'Request A Quotation' page (QuotationRequestPage.tsx), remove the file attachment input entirely. Replace it with a clearly labeled radio button or toggle option asking: 'Is your design ready?' with two choices — 'Yes, my design is ready' and 'No, I need design assistance'. Store this selection in the quotation submission payload using an appropriate field (e.g., designStatus: 'ready' | 'needed').

quotes: on request A Quotation remove the attach file and just ask a option to customer design is redy or need to

acceptanceCriteria: No file upload input or attachment button is visible on the quotation form
A 'Is your design ready?' question is displayed with two selectable options: 'Yes, my design is ready' and 'No, I need design assistance'
The selected design status is submitted with the quotation to the backend
The option is displayed in both English and Telugu based on current language setting
Admin quotation management page displays the design status for each quotation

requirements.text: In AdminLoginPage.tsx, after a successful email/password login (verifyAuthentication returns success), immediately redirect the user to the Admin Dashboard page (/admin/dashboard or equivalent admin dashboard route) instead of any intermediate or default page.

quotes: after login email and password correct let take the owner to Admin Dashboard

acceptanceCriteria: After entering correct admin email and password, the user is automatically redirected to the Admin Dashboard page
No manual navigation step is required after successful login
Incorrect credentials show an error message and do not redirect
Biometric and Internet Identity login paths are unaffected

requirements.text: Improve the overall customer-facing UX and visual appeal of the app to make it more attractive, easier to use, and shareable. Apply the following enhancements: (1) Add a prominent, visually appealing 'Share This App' call-to-action on the Home page using the existing ShareAppButton component. (2) Improve the hero section on HomePage.tsx with a bold tagline, a clear call-to-action button, and vibrant accent colors consistent with the existing print-industry theme. (3) Add smooth hover and tap animations to service cards, gallery items, and navigation elements. (4) Improve button styling across all customer-facing pages for consistency — use filled primary buttons for main actions and outline/ghost for secondary actions. (5) On the customer portal and quotation pages, display friendly status messages and progress indicators to guide customers through the order journey. (6) Add a 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge or text on all pages in a visually subtle but permanent manner.

quotes: make easyer to customer happay and atractive to use my app and share

acceptanceCriteria: Home page has a clear share button visible to customers without scrolling far
Hero section has a bold headline and primary CTA button
Service cards and gallery items have visible hover/tap transitions
All primary action buttons share a consistent filled style across customer pages
Customer portal shows friendly status progress for their orders
'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' text is visible in the footer on all pages

requirements.text: Ensure a fully functional and prominent language switch between English and Telugu is available on all pages. The LanguageToggle component should be visible in both the header (Layout.tsx) and the bottom navigation or a fixed floating position on mobile. Ensure all customer-facing pages — including QuotationRequestPage, CustomerLoginPage, CustomerRegistrationPage, CustomerPortalPage, HomePage, ServicesPage, ContactUsPage, and TestimonialsPage — use translations from LanguageContext and display correctly in both languages. Add any missing translation keys to both en.ts and te.ts.

quotes: make two language diffrent version and give a option to swich

acceptanceCriteria: Language toggle button is visible in the app header on all screen sizes
Switching language immediately updates all visible text without a page reload
All customer-facing pages display fully in Telugu when Telugu is selected
All customer-facing pages display fully in English when English is selected
Language preference persists across page navigation and browser refresh
New quotation design-status option (REQ-1) has translations in both languages

requirements.text: Set the permanent app branding to 'Nellore Printing Hub' everywhere it appears: browser tab title (index.html), Layout header logo text, HomePage hero, About page, and any other visible app name instances. Add 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' as a permanent subtitle or badge in the footer of Layout.tsx, visible on every page. This branding must not be editable by admins and must appear consistently in both language modes.

quotes: this app name should be Nellore Printing Hub sponsor by Magic Advertising forever

acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab title reads 'Nellore Printing Hub'
App header/logo displays 'Nellore Printing Hub'
Footer permanently shows 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' on every page
The sponsor text is not removable or editable through the admin panel
Branding is consistent in both English and Telugu language modes

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo single actor
Existing admin and customer authentication flows must remain functional
The 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' branding must be hardcoded and not admin-configurable
nonGoals: Adding new backend services or external APIs
Changing the admin user management or invitation system
Modifying the Internet Identity authentication flow
Redesigning the admin-facing pages (focus is on customer-facing UX)
Adding new service types or gallery categories

required: Vibrant hero banner for a printing business with bold typography, ink splashes, and warm orange-red accent colors on a dark background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge with a small magic wand icon and elegant typography on a transparent background (magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png)
